title: Restore Masjid Al-Nour — Omdurman North District
story: Masjid Al-Nour in Omdurman's northern Wad Nubawi quarter was severely damaged during the April 2025 conflict and subsequent displacement. The structure's eastern wall collapsed, the roof is partially destroyed, and the wudu facilities are unusable. Our congregation of roughly 340 families has been performing prayers in a neighbouring courtyard exposed to the elements. We are seeking SDG 4,200,000 to cover masonry, roofing, and the restoration of water supply. The Sudan Community Relief Federation is coordinating disbursement and will oversee all contractor payments on the congregation's behalf.
vouching_narrative: The organizer, Khalid Ibrahim Osman, is an elder of the Wad Nubawi congregation and is personally known to the SCRF field officer who co-signed the appeal. SCRF states it manages fund receipt and contractor disbursement directly, with the organizer serving as the community liaison.
